1897200.name: Coloring Pixels - Cute Pack
1897200.description:
Cute Book

This Cute themed book unlocks 20 additional levels for Coloring Pixels! This book adds new images that are all very cute to look at and color!

From babies to animals, to cute scenes - this book fits right in with any Valentine's gift!

Contents

The Cute book unlocks the following images:

  • Loving Gesture - 25x51
  • Baby - 27x40
  • Teddy Bear - 40x52
  • Egg - 45x58
  • Love Birds - 47x47
  • Smug Cat - 54x64
  • Mushroom - 56x64
  • Corgi - 60x62
  • Geisha - 65x63
  • Fox - 70x95
  • Bunny - 78x78
  • Hugs - 80x80
  • Childs Party - 90x29
  • Valentine - 100x110
  • Cherry Blossom - 120x90
  • Stargazing - 130x130
  • Hatchling - 150x134
  • Puppies - 199x105
  • Cupcakes - 240x270
  • Bear Cubs - 250x250
